close_reason: Implemented turnkey-check pre-commit hook that runs tk check. Added preCommitCheck option to configure.
description:
Add pre-commit hook that runs `tk check` before commits.

Prevents committing when BUCK files or deps are out of sync.

Hook configuration (git-hooks / pre-commit):
```yaml
- repo: local
  hooks:
    - id: turnkey-check
      name: Check BUCK files in sync
      entry: tk check
      language: system
      pass_filenames: false
```

On failure, suggest running `tk sync` to fix.
title: Pre-commit hook: tk check validation
